ocr.text: In the 2Q FY2025 analysis for Hapag-Lloyd, the bunker fuel cost analysis reveals that Marine Diesel costs $850SGD per ton
with a volume used of 2000 tons, totaling a cost of 1,700,000SGD, reflecting a cost change of 5%, categorized as Increased
under Diesel. Heavy Fuel Oil is priced at $600SGD per ton with a usage of 3000 tons, resulting in 1,800,000SGD, showing a
stable cost change of 3%, classified as Bunker Oil.

LNG has a cost of $1,200SGD per ton with a volume of 1500 tons, leading to a total cost of 1,800,000SGD, indicating a 2%
decrease, categorized as Alternative Fuel. The overall total bunker fuel showcases an average cost of 716.67SGD, a total
volume of 6500 tons, and total expenditure of 5,300,000SGD, with a change in cost of 2%, summarized as Mixed in status and
labeled Analysis under projected costs.
